ham.subject: Out of Office: John Doe – Returning 15 June
ham.body:
Hi Team,

I am currently out of the office with limited email access and will return on 15 June. If you need assistance while I’m away, please reach out to Sarah Smith at sarah.smith@company.com or call the office line at 555‑1234.

Thank you for your understanding.

Best regards,
John Doe

spam.subject: Urgent: QuickBooks Invoice Payment Required – Immediate Action Needed
spam.body:
Dear Valued Client,

We have generated your QuickBooks invoice for the period 01‑01‑2024 to 31‑01‑2024. Please review the attached invoice and complete payment to avoid service interruption. For security, verify your account details by clicking the link below and confirming your bank information.

<URL>

If the invoice is not settled within 48 hours, your QuickBooks account will be suspended as a mandatory compliance measure.

Thank you for your cooperation.

Best regards,
Norton Billing Team
